uplink.description: measurement frame: 25.00 C / 50.00 % on internal channel 0
uplink._note: Synthetic in-bounds 0xA0 'Trame de mesure': temp type 0x08 -> 0x09C4=2500/100=25.00 C; hum type 0x09 -> 0x1388=5000/100=50.00 %. expected.data produced by running reference/upstream-codec.js (temperature0.value=[25], humidity0.value=[50]) and mapping to the normalized vocabulary.
Synthetic: temp 0x0857=2135/100=21.35 C; hum 0x1308=4872/100=48.72 %. Verified against reference/upstream-codec.js (temperature0.value=[21.35], humidity0.value=[48.72]).
Synthetic two's-complement temperature: 0xFE0C as signed 16-bit = -500/100 = -5.00 C. Verified against reference/upstream-codec.js (temperature0.value=[-5]).
Synthetic: high nibble of the type byte selects voie 1 (0x18 temp, 0x19 hum). Verified against reference/upstream-codec.js (temperature1/humidity1, voie '1').

uplink.description: life frame: battery 3.55 V, supply rail 5.000 V
uplink._note: Synthetic 0x81 'Trame de vie': tensionv 0x0DDE=3550/1000=3.55 V -> battery; tensionc 0x1388=5000/1000=5 V -> supplyVoltage. Verified against reference/upstream-codec.js (tensionv.value=3.55, tensionc.value=5).

uplink.description: measurement frame: temperature sensor fault, humidity valid
uplink._note: Synthetic: temp 0x8000 = -327.68 C is the upstream sensor-fault sentinel (reference temperature0.value=['erreur']); humidity remains valid. Faulty channel is dropped and a warning is emitted.

uplink.description: error frame yields no climate measurement
uplink._note: Synthetic 0x8E 'Trame d'erreur' (reference decodes a diagnostic 'Erreur' object). This codec only normalizes temperature/humidity, so an error frame returns errors.

uplink.description: unknown frame type yields no climate measurement
uplink._note: Synthetic 0x83 -> reference 'Type de trame inconnu'; no temperature/humidity to normalize.
Synthetic empty payload; reference returns an empty data object, this codec reports an explicit error.
